name: Grok (SuperGrok) via x.com

how_to_open_grok.description: How to navigate to Grok's chat interface.
steps: 1. Open Chrome or use the existing browser window.
2. Navigate to x.com/grok — BUT this may load the Grok profile page, not the chat.
3. If you see a profile page, look for 'SuperGrok' in the left sidebar and click it.
4. The SuperGrok chat interface has a text box that says 'Ask anything'.
5. Alternative: navigate directly to x.com/i/grok which may go straight to the chat.

how_to_upload_image_and_prompt.description: How to upload an image and send a prompt to Grok.
steps: 1. First type your text prompt in the 'Ask anything' text box.
2. Find the paperclip/attachment icon — it's on the LEFT side inside the text input box.
3. Click the paperclip icon. A file browser dialog opens.
4. In the file browser, navigate to the file location or type the file path.
5. Select the image file and click 'Open'.
6. The image thumbnail should appear in the chat input area.
7. Click the send button (arrow icon) on the RIGHT side of the text input box.
8. Wait 30-40+ seconds for Grok to process the image.
9. Scroll down to see the result.

known_issues: x.com/grok may load the profile page instead of the chat — click SuperGrok in sidebar.
Image processing takes 30-40+ seconds — be patient.
SuperGrok (paid tier) may be required for image editing.
The paperclip button is INSIDE the text box on the LEFT side, not above it.
The send button (arrow) is on the RIGHT side of the text box.
strategy_for_agent: 1. Open x.com/i/grok in the browser (use open_website action).
2. Wait for the page to load (wait 3-5 seconds).
3. Look at the screen to verify the Grok chat interface is visible.
4. If you see a profile page, look for and click 'SuperGrok' in the left sidebar.
5. Click the text input box ('Ask anything').
6. Type your prompt using type_in_web or type_text.
7. Click the paperclip/attachment button (LEFT side of text box) to attach an image.
8. In the file picker dialog, type the file path and press Enter.
9. Wait for the image thumbnail to appear.
10. Click the send button (arrow, RIGHT side of text box) or press Enter to submit.
11. Wait 30-40 seconds for Grok to process.
12. Look at the screen to verify Grok responded.
